data.current_description: Retrieve current job status and details.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve transcription job status and details

message: Operation 'getTranscript' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details. Summary is adequate. Description mentions the Accept header but lacks clarity about supported formats and what the operation returns. Enhanced description specifies example formats and clarifies the return value for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve transcript in the specified format. Use the Accept header to specify the desired format.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the transcript for a completed transcription job in the specified format. Use the Accept header to specify the desired output format (e.g., JSON, plain text, SRT). Returns the transcript data in the requested format.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description mentions the Accept header but lacks clarity about supported formats and what the operation returns. Enhanced description specifies example formats and clarifies the return value for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'shareTranscript' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the action and permissions but lacks clarity about what is returned. Enhanced description specifies that a URL is returned and clarifies access requirements for recipients.

data.current_description: Generate a shareable editor link with full editing permissions.
data.description_suggestion: Generate a shareable editor link for the transcript with full editing permissions. Returns a shareable URL that allows recipients to view and edit the transcript without requiring authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the action and permissions but lacks clarity about what is returned. Enhanced description specifies that a URL is returned and clarifies access requirements for recipients.
